promptDescription: - **rangebar** — horizontal bar spanning a numeric range (min to max) per category. Best for price bands by category, salary ranges by job title, or any per-group spread comparison. Spec: { "type":"rangebar", "title":"...", "xLabel":"Price ($)", "data":[{"label":"Bikes","min":200,"max":3578},{"label":"Components","min":2,"max":1432}] }
renderScript: function(wrap,spec){var C=['#534AB7','#7F77DD','#2E9CDB','#4BC1A8','#E8833A','#E85858','#9B59B6','#27AE60','#F39C12','#1ABC9C','#3498DB','#E74C3C','#2ECC71','#F1C40F','#8E44AD'];function getT(){return{text:'#1a1a18',text2:'#5a5a56',grid:'rgba(0,0,0,0.06)'};}function load(url,g,cb){if(window[g]){cb();return;}for(var i=0;i<document.scripts.length;i++){if(document.scripts[i].src===url){if(document.scripts[i]._ld){cb();return;}document.scripts[i].addEventListener('load',cb);return;}}var s=document.createElement('script');s.src=url;s.onload=function(){s._ld=true;cb();};document.head.appendChild(s);}load('https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/apexcharts@3/dist/apexcharts.min.js','ApexCharts',function(){if(!wrap.style.height)wrap.style.height='420px';wrap._chartSpec=spec;var t=getT();var baseChart={background:'#ffffff',toolbar:{show:false},fontFamily:'Segoe UI, system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif',foreColor:t.text};var titleOpt={text:spec.title||'',align:'center',style:{fontSize:'13px',fontWeight:'500',color:t.text}};var axisLabel={style:{colors:t.text2,fontSize:'11px'}};var rbData=(spec.data||[]).map(function(d){return{x:d.label||d.name||d.category||'',y:[+(d.min!=null?d.min:d.low!=null?d.low:0),+(d.max!=null?d.max:d.high!=null?d.high:0)]};});var rbXaxis={labels:axisLabel};if(spec.xLabel)rbXaxis.title={text:spec.xLabel,style:{color:t.text2,fontSize:'11px'}};var options={chart:Object.assign({},baseChart,{type:'rangeBar',height:'100%'}),series:[{name:spec.seriesLabel||'Range',data:rbData}],plotOptions:{bar:{horizontal:true,barHeight:'45%'}},colors:[C[0]],xaxis:rbXaxis,yaxis:{labels:axisLabel},title:titleOpt,tooltip:{y:{formatter:function(v){return v.toLocaleString();}}},theme:{mode:'light'},grid:{borderColor:t.grid}};new ApexCharts(wrap,options).render();});}
